title: CONFORMANCE.v0.1
description: E1 conformance check result per run (tier, pass, reasons)

tier.description: Conformance tier reached (1=artifacts present and valid, 2=+replay and schema ok, 3=+PONR coverage)

pass.description: True if run meets the bar for the reported tier

reasons.description: Failure reasons when pass is false; empty when pass is true
